exercises.title: Security Target Template
exercises.description: Create a template for PQC product Security Target document.
tasks: Define ST structure per CC requirements
exercises.expectedOutput: Security Target template generator for PQC products

exercises.title: Evidence Matrix Builder
exercises.description: Build a matrix mapping evidence to FIPS and CC requirements.
tasks: Map to CC SFRs and SARs
hints: CAVP serves both FIPS and FCS_COP

exercises.title: Protection Profile Analyzer
exercises.description: Analyze applicable Protection Profiles for PQC products.
tasks: Note gaps in current PPs for PQC
exercises.expectedOutput: Protection Profile analysis for PQC products
hints: Check NIAP, BSI, and ANSSI catalogues
Many PPs are being updated for PQC
Consider targeted PP vs general module PP

exercises.title: Evaluation Timeline Planner
exercises.description: Create a combined FIPS + CC evaluation timeline planner.
hints: CAVP can run in parallel with CC lab work
CMVP queue is often the bottleneck
CC scheme review varies by country
